qMetaDef.title: Deprecated charts
qMetaDef.description: Occasionally, Qlik needs to deprecate old charts. This sheet tracks events generated when users access sheets containing these charts.

qMsg.qv: No deprecated chart events were found.

customErrorMessage.calcCond: No deprecated chart events were found.

qStringExpression.qExpr: 'Deprecated charts are logged when a sheet is opened. Removing a chart from an app will not remove events relating to that object, so use the last impacted session date to determine event freshness. Deleted apps are excluded.'

qProperty.title: About deprecated charts
qProperty.text: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Charts listed on this sheet are marked as deprecation and will be removed from the product in May 2027 (as of this version of the App Analyzer). At that point, these charts will no longer render and will display an error message to all extensionMeta.name: Text
extensionMeta.description: Display text, links, and measures. Add tables with rows and columns. Format and color the text. Add background image and color.
extensionMeta.author: QlikTech International AB

bundle.name: Qlik Dashboard bundle
bundle.description:
This is a set of supported objects that will facilitate dashboard creation in Qlik Sense. These can be used in addition to the objects found under "Charts".

For limitations and support conditions, see the documentation.
